name: ae-mcp
description: After Effects MCP Server - AI-powered motion design automation

scripts.build: esbuild src/index.ts src/bridge.ts src/script-builder.ts src/tools/project.ts src/tools/composition.ts src/tools/layer.ts src/tools/animation.ts src/tools/expression.ts src/tools/motion-design.ts src/tools/render.ts src/tools/script.ts --outdir=dist --outbase=src --platform=node --format=esm --target=node18
